title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 349.052 - General and business corporation law applicable — exceptions
text:
349.052.  General and business corporation law applicable — exceptions. — The general and business corporation law of Missouri, chapter 351, shall be applicable to industrial development corporations organized pursuant to this chapter except that any provision of this chapter shall take precedence over any provision of chapter 351 which conflicts with it.
(L. 1978 S.B. 761 § 349.025)
